description:
Backlog anchor: `packages/pi-om-extension/docs/mastra-parity-backlog.md` → **Tier 1 / section 6. Stable, cache-friendly observation block layout**.

Goal: minimize byte churn in unchanged OM sections so durable observations stay stable while only volatile task/guidance sections move when necessary.

Relevant code paths:
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/engine.ts`
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/format.ts`
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/state.ts`
- any helper introduced for deterministic rendering/normalization

Worker notes:
- watch for unnecessary reflow, whitespace churn, and reordered sections/items
- keep append/reflection behavior compatible with the stability goal
- this is about deterministic rendering, not changing the semantic content model
title: Minimize churn in unchanged OM sections and keep durable observations formatting stable
